title: CreeperGuard
description:
Creeper Antigrief.
Prevents creeper explosions from destroying blocks while still damaging nearby entities.
body:
# CreeperGuard

[![Available on Modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vLuckyyy/badges/main/avaiable-on-modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/creeper-guard)
[![Available on Hangar](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vLuckyyy/badges/main/avaiable-on-hangar.svg)](https://hangar.papermc.io/karlsson1000/CreeperGuard)
[![Available on SpigotMC](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vLuckyyy/badges/main/available-on-spigotmc.svg)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/creeperguard-antigrief.127857/)

**Protect your builds from creepers without removing the danger.**

> **Note:** This plugin does **not** modify the gamerule `mobGriefing`.

A simple, lightweight plugin that protects your builds from creeper explosions without removing the challenge of survival gameplay.  
When enabled, creeper explosions will no longer break or remove blocks, but they will still damage players, mobs and other entities nearby.

## Config.yml
```yaml
# CreeperGuard Configuration
creeperguard-enabled: true

# Enable bStats metrics
metrics: true
```

## Commands and Permissions
| Command        | Description               | Aliases | Permission          | Usage                 |
|----------------|---------------------------|---------|---------------------|-----------------------|
| /creeperguard  | Toggle creeper protection | cg      | creeperguard.admin  | /<command> [on \| off]  |

![Easy to use](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4a7e8e5bc417ef3cbbb0be4289fb66409533256.png)

<details>
<summary>bStats</summary>
